insight: On modern BungeeCord builds (e.g. 26.1-R0.1 b2076), `ServerSwitchEvent` can fire twice and BEFORE `ServerConnectedEvent` on initial join, even with no other plugins installed. If a handler relies on connect populating state before switch reads it, JOIN messages get suppressed and a bogus `serverA -> serverA` SWITCH is broadcast. Make handlers order-independent and guard switch against `from == null` and `from == to`.
